description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, featuring a white brick exterior and large windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The front of the house includes a covered porch with seating, while the rear opens onto a spacious patio with outdoor dining furniture, a pergola, and a swimming pool. The property is landscaped with a few tall, slender trees and a small patch of grass near the entrance. The upper floor has balconies and visible laundry lines, suggesting residential use and daily activity. The house is accessed by a prominent staircase leading up to the main entrance, and the overall design emphasizes open, functional outdoor spaces. The architectural style is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, two-story white brick bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, covered porch, balconies, and a backyard patio with a pool and pergola. The design is open and contemporary, featuring landscaped greenery and functional outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front facade with a covered porch, visible balcony, and a staircase leading to the main entrance, flanked by three tall trees.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the side of the bungalow with the staircase, a grassy area beneath the porch, and a clear view of the backyard patio and pool.
description_view_2: View 2 focuses on the rear of the bungalow, showcasing the large patio area, outdoor dining set, pergola, and swimming pool, with the house's windows and balconies visible above.
description_view_3: View 3 presents the opposite side of the bungalow, emphasizing the vertical garden wall, additional porch area, and the overall boxy, modern structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and balcony doors
